data.title: Sui network faces another pause due to ongoing software bug, leading to almost 6 hours downtime post-update issue.
data.description: The network outage was triggered by a software bug in the update system, the same bug that caused disruptions in the protocol last Thursday. This recent incident led to almost six hours of downtime.

data.title: Oculis Announces Topline Results from DIAMOND Phase 3 Trials with OCS-01 in Diabetic Macular Edema
data.description: Switzerland's Oculis Holding AG revealed the findings of its Phase 3 DIAMOND-1 and DIAMOND-2 trials regarding OCS-01 eye drops for diabetic macular edema. The company, traded as Nasdaq: OCS and XICE: OCS, concentrates on developing solutions for neuro-ophthalmology and ophthalmology. This announcement was made on May 29, 2026.

data.title: Sandbox VR Continues to Expand with its First Permanent Arizona Location in Gilbert, Opening June 5th
data.description: Sandbox VR, known for offering unparalleled virtual reality experiences, is launching its first permanent location in Arizona at SanTan Village near Phoenix. The expansion, set to open on May 29, 2026, marks a significant milestone for the company as it aims to provide top-quality VR experiences. Sandbox VR is recognized as the leading destination for location-based VR adventures, and its new venue is expected to elevate the entertainment scene in the area. This move will bring cutting-edge technology and immersive experiences to the local community, enhancing the entertainment options available in the region.

data.title: CORRECTING and REPLACING Karman Space & Defense Provides Operational Data Update in Connection with Launch of Secondary Offering
data.description: In Huntington Beach, California, Karman Space & Defense has released an operational data update in relation to the secondary offering launch. The company, identified by the ticker symbol KRMN, is actively involved in the aerospace and defense sector. This update includes key information regarding their recent activities and developments.

data.title: BETTER WORLD FRAGRANCE HOUSE BY DRAKE INTRODUCES CLOUDAR EAU DE PARFUM
data.description: A new woody aromatic fragrance, the second eau de parfum in the series, has been introduced by Better World Fragrance House. This luxury fragrance lifestyle brand, created by global music sensation Drake, continues to develop its unique scent collection. The announcement of the perfume, named Cloudar, was made in New York on May 29, 2026.

data.title: Two Accountants Talking S*** Brings Unfiltered Financial Truth to Small Business Owners
data.description: On May 29, 2026, in New York, two veteran CPAs named Mike Savage and Gary Milkwick introduced their new podcast titled "Two Accountants Talking S***." The podcast aims to provide unfiltered financial discussions catering to small business owners. Both Savage and Milkwick bring decades of experience in assisting businesses with their financial matters.

data.title: ACC Participates in Roundtable Held to Conserve The Great Salt Lake
data.description: On May 29, 2026 in Salt Lake City, the American Conservation Coalition (ACC) participated in a roundtable discussion regarding the preservation and rehabilitation of the Great Salt Lake. The event was attended by Utah Governor Spencer Cox, Great Salt Lake Commissioner Brian Steed, federal officials, and various stakeholders. The discussion aimed to address the urgent need for conservation efforts in the region.

data.title: University of Phoenix Launches Phoenix Veterans and Affiliates Network (PVAN) to Support Military-Connected Students and Alumni
data.description: A new student group at the University of Phoenix, called Phoenix Veterans and Affiliates Network (PVAN), has been established to provide support for military-connected learners in terms of retention and career readiness. This organization was launched on May 29, 2026, and is the university's first internally created student organization aimed at assisting this demographic. PVAN's aim is to assist military-connected learners in successfully completing their studies and preparing for their future careers.

data.title: Oculis reveals findings from DIAMOND Phase 3 Trials with OCS-01 for Diabetic Macular Edema, showcasing promising outcomes.
data.description: In an announcement made yesterday, it was revealed that the government will be allocating approximately $1.5 billion towards a new initiative aimed at improving healthcare access for rural communities. The initiative is set to benefit over 3 million individuals living in underserved areas across the country. The funding will be used to establish new healthcare facilities, upgrade existing infrastructure, and provide training for healthcare professionals. This investment is seen as a significant step towards addressing the persistent healthcare disparities faced by rural populations.

data.title: Kentucky First Federal Bancorp Board mulling over restarting quarterly dividend payments.
data.description: In a recent announcement, it was reported that the global economy is expected to grow by approximately 3.5% in the coming year. This forecast is based on an increase in consumer spending and investments. Additionally, unemployment rates are projected to decrease to around 5.5%. In terms of trade, it is anticipated that global trade will rise by 6% in the near future. The technology sector is set to experience significant growth, with an estimated increase of 8% in revenue. Overall, these positive trends indicate a promising outlook for the world economy in the upcoming year.

data.title: Elon Musk aims to generate FOMO as SpaceX IPO approaches. Wall Street fears missing out more than its failure.
data.description: Elon Musk is collaborating with financial experts to establish a self-fulfilling prophecy for the upcoming IPO by emphasizing the potential consequences of not participating in it compared to the perceived risks associated with investing in it.

data.title: AI Computer Design Diversity A Boon For Synopsys, Says CFO
data.description: The trend of AI companies utilizing customized computer designs to enhance their systems is on the rise, a move that is expected to benefit Synopsys. According to the CFO, the diversified approach to AI computer design is likely to have a positive impact on the company's stock performance.

data.title: InfoSight's New Dashboard Turns Fragmented Threat Data into Executive-Ready Risk Decisions
data.description: InfoSight, Inc., a prominent cybersecurity provider, has launched a new dashboard designed to offer Chief Information Security Officers (CISOs), Chief Security Officers (CSOs), and senior technology leaders a comprehensive overview of their organization's current cyber risk status. Rolled out in Miami on May 29, 2026, this dashboard provides insights into active threats, industry-specific intelligence, and suggested remediation steps. This tool aims to centralize critical information for decision-makers, helping them stay informed and proactive in addressing cybersecurity challenges.

Trump did not reach a decision on any new deal with Iran, according to a senior administration official who spoke on condition of anonymity.

data.title: In HelloNation, Real Estate Expert Marty Pecoraro Explains Why Buyers Are Relocating to Estero, FL
data.description: In a recent article, the appeal of Southwest Florida is discussed, with a focus on Estero. With its emphasis on outdoor living, modern neighborhoods, and adaptable lifestyles, Estero has become a magnet for homebuyers. The article, published on May 29, 2026, delves into the reasons behind the increasing migration to the area, highlighting the amenities and opportunities that draw people to Estero.

data.title: Thanks a Million! Avelo Flies One Millionth Customer at Wilmington Airport
data.description: In Wilmington, Del., on May 29, 2026, Avelo Airlines celebrates a significant milestone as they mark flying their one millionth Customer departing from the Wilmington Airport (ILG) in just over three years since launching flights from the Philadelphia region. The one millionth ILG Customer was seen on Flight 560, making a momentous occasion for the airline.
